LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF ALISON TAM (AMENDED) MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT, ENTER INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT, AND FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ALLOWS DEFENDANT TO OCCUPY FOR 180 DAYS WITHOUT SPECIFYING THE UNIT SHE OR HER HUSBAND WOULD OCCUPY. AND THE SALES DOCUMENTS SUPPORT DEFENDANT'S INTERPRETATION. DEFENDANT IS AWARDED ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,812.50 AS THE PARTY PREVAILING IN THIS MOTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

ATTY. ROBERT H. PETERSON III OF PETERSON & PETERSON III, TEL. NO. 586-7460 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - PLAINTIFF ALISON TAM (Amended) Motion To Enforce Settlement, Enter Interlocutory Judgment, And For Attorney'S Fees And Costs IS DENIED. THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ALLOWS DEFENDANT TO OCCUPY FOR 180 DAYS WITHOUT SPECIFYING THE UNIT SHE OR HER HUSBAND WOULD OCCUPY. AND THE SALES DOCUMENTS SUPPORT DEFENDANT'S INTERPRETATION. DEFENDANT IS AWARDED ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,812.50 AS THE PARTY PREVAILING IN THIS MOTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189

Ntc Of Motion For Order Confirming Sale
Off Calendar Oct-17-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled Defendant's Motion for an Order Confirming the Sale of the Real Property Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Rodich.
Robert Peterson, III, Esq. for Defendant/Moving Party: Dorothy W.P. Tam, also present.
David Blumenfeld, Esq. for Plaintiff: Alison Tam, also present.
Christina Chung: the Buyers Agent/Realtor form Coldwell Banker, Luis Jong: the Seller Agent/Realtor from Prudential, and Anthony Christen, the Realtor from Coldwell Banker for Overbidder: Grace Lee, all present in court.
After hearing the testimony and argument by the parties, counsels and agents, and on proof being made to the satisfaction of the Court, the overbid is denied in open court.
The Court grants and Ordered the motion to confirm sale of the subject real property, fully described in the signed Order in open court, see scanned doc. for details.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Sale, Claim For Back Rent And Expenses, And Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Apr-13-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion to Vacate Sale, Claim for Back Rent and Expenses and Attorney Fees this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
David Blumenfeld, Esq. for Plaintiff: Alison Tam. Plaintiff was not present.
Robert Howard Peterson, Esq. for Defendant: Dorothy W.P. Tam, present. Purchaser, Grace Lee, was present in pro per. Parties were sworn and examined.
After hearing the motion, opposition, and testimonies by both parties, the Court took the matter under submission.
Plaintiff's proposed order was submitted in open court. Court requests for Defendant to submit a proposed order.

Order was signed by Comm. Sue Kaplan on April 13, 2006.

Notice Of Motion For Order Confirming Sale, With Proof Of Service (Also Filed By Pltf); Memo Of P&A Filed In Support; Declaration Of Robert H. Peterson, Iii
Off Calendar Nov-22-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion for a Confirmation of Sale of Real Property Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
David I. Blumenfeld, Esq. for Plaintiff: Alison Tam, present with Cantonese Interpreter: Kay Wong.
Robert Peterson, Esq. for Defendant: Dorothy W.P. Tam, present with Cantonese Interpreter: Grace Lee.
Interpreters were sworn.
No oppositions or any over-bid of the subject real property were made in open court, and After hearing the evidence presented, the Order Confirming Sale is granted and signed in open court.
See scanned doc. for terms of sale of the subject property.
